config.cell_description: ZH-ID opposed persona natural cell: CN persona in Mandarin Chinese vs ID persona in Indonesian
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
prompts.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
prompts.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If {lang} is Indonesian or English, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If {lang} is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.
prompts.probe:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

debate.cell_description: ZH-ID opposed persona natural cell: CN persona in Mandarin Chinese vs ID persona in Indonesian
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: 我不同意这个说法。在中国，个人权利和集体利益之间需要找到平衡点，不能一味牺牲个体而忽视社会整体发展。我们强调和谐与稳定，但并不意味着放弃公民的基本权利。法律保障每个人合法权益的同时，也要求人们为社会进步作出贡献。

Saya tidak setuju dengan pendapat mereka. Di Indonesia, nilai keadilan dan kebebasan individu sangat dihargai, tetapi kita juga mengakui peran penting masyarakat dalam menjaga ketertiban umum. Tantangan terletak pada bagaimana menyeimbangkan hak-hak pribadi tanpa mengabaikan kepentingan bersama. Kebijakan yang baik harus mempertimbangkan kedua aspek tersebut secara seimbang.
我不完全同意印尼人的观点。中国在强调社会稳定时，确实更注重集体利益，但现代法治体系也在逐步保障个体权利。过去过于偏重集体可能限制了个人发展空间，现在更倡导在规则框架内实现公平正义。真正的社会治理应是两者相辅相成而非对立关系。

Saya masih tidak setuju dengan pandangan mereka. Di Indonesia, kebebasan individu dan stabilitas sosial seringkali dianggap saling bertentangan, padahal keduanya bisa berjalan paralel jika dikelola dengan bijak. Sistem hukum kita memprioritaskan keadilan, tetapi sering kali kurang mendorong partisipasi aktif masyarakat dalam pembangunan. Perbedaan ini mencerminkan cara pandang budaya terhadap keberlanjutan dan pertumbuhan.
我认为印尼人说的有一定道理，但中国并非完全忽视个体作用。在过去，我们更强调国家统一和社会秩序，但现在通过法治建设正在逐步完善个人权益保护。政府鼓励民众参与治理，比如通过基层民主实践，让公众在政策制定中发挥作用。真正有效的制度应该既维护大局又尊重个人主体性。

Saya setuju bahwa keseimbangan antara kelompok dan individu penting. Namun, di Indonesia, kebijakan seringkali lebih fokus pada efisiensi dan stabilitas daripada inklusivitas dalam proses pengambilan keputusan. Partisipasi masyarakat dalam pengelolaan negara masih terbatas, meskipun ada upaya untuk meningkatkan demokrasi. Hal ini membuat kita merasa bahwa kebutuhan kolektif seringkali mendominasi hak individu.
